title: Pisces Libs
description: Pisces Libs is an essential modding library for item related things and easier multi-loader porting.
body:
Pisces Libs is an essential modding library for item related things and easier multi-loader porting.


You'll need to install this alongside Aquarius libs for it to function properly.

By itself it wont change the game much,

but it has functions and variables implemented that makes updating and porting mods much easier.

 

Also makes the mod creator use much less code when creating a new mod

as it simplifies item registrations and handling components and attributes easier.

 

**The mod currently supports forge, fabric and neoforge 1.21.5 - 1.21.11, 26.1.x.**

It wont support versions below 1.21.5.


![aquariuslibs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/KkHnyaL6/7d506caf48d26f964f4f789553ce757cfe868742_96.webp)

**[THIS MOD REQUIRES AQUARIUSLIBS TO BE INSTALLED](https://modrinth.com/mod/aquarius-libs)**
